slides.HOOK_TITLE: 3 mistakes I made as a junior data scientist.
slides.HOOK_SUB: And how I finally learned to approach a messy dataset →
slides.BODY_1_TEXT: I used to just .dropna() everywhere. I ignored the fact that missing data often has a pattern. Now, I use simple imputation or investigate the root cause first.
slides.BODY_2_TEXT: XGBoost won't save a terrible feature space. Most of the real magic happens in exploratory data analysis and feature engineering. Spend 80% of your time there.
slides.BODY_3_TEXT: I once optimized a model for 99% accuracy but it solved the wrong problem. Accuracy doesn't matter if you aren't improving the actual business KPI.
slides.CTA_TEXT: I share real-world AI and Data Science lessons every week. Hit follow so you don't miss the next one.
